title: NOKLEAD Thermometer Humidity Meter Inside Mini Hygrometer Monitor Room Temperature Measuring Device with Face Icon Comfort Indicator ℃/℉ Switch for Baby Room Greenhouse Office Living Room（2）
features: 【Accurate Measuring Range】The temperature range that can be measured is from -9.9℃ to 60℃ (14.18℉ to 140℉),with an accuracy of ±1.0℃ and a resolution of 0.1℃. The humidity range that can be measured is from 10%RH to 95%RH,with an accuracy of ±3-5%RH and a resolution of 1%RH.Data measurements are updated in real time to give you the latest updates on your environment.

【Face Icon Comfort Indicator】Know the slight changes at your home at a glance with comfort level face icon,a smile or an unhappy expression can remind you to adjust the humidifier or dehumidifier device in time.

【Easy to use & place】One button on the back is designed for your convenience to switch between ℃ and ℉.This indoor thermometer and hygrometer can be placed on a table or attached to the wall using double-sided adhesive tape(included).It's lightweight and space-saving so you can place it anywhere you like.

【Portable & Compact Design】The dimensions of the thermometer and hygrometer are 46x50x12mm and it weighs only 26g.So it is an ultra-light and ultra-thin electronic thermometer and hygrometer,making it easier to carry.

【Unique Safety Screw Switch】The battery back cover of the thermometer and hygrometer is screwed on to prevent baby from swallowing it.The battery CR2032(included) has low energy consumption and a long service life,eliminating the need for frequent battery replacements.

【Wide Range of Uses】This thermometer hygrometer is equipped with a temperature and humidity monitor,making it suitable for a variety of settings such as living rooms,greenhouses,bedrooms,wine cellars,warehouses,offices,baby rooms,reptile habitats,terrariums,cars,plants and wardrobes.
